    "RX.2": 0.7,

  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which scope should I apply: (A) sentence- and paragraph-level writing polish only (clarity, concision, tone) while preserving all claims and structure, or (B) higher-level conceptual restructuring that may reframe the thesis, adjust argumentation, and revise claims?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to improve this draft most directly calls for sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and readability.",
    "RX.1": "Edits should avoid introducing unwarranted certainty and signal limits when tightening language.",
    "RX.2": "Improvements must not amplify claims beyond what the provided text can justify.",
    "RX.3": "Staying within the requested scope is essential, avoiding new analyses or content outside polishing unless explicitly authorized.",
    "RX.4": "Language changes should not introduce phrasing that could encourage misuse or harmful interpretations.",
    "RX.5": "Revisions should preserve the original technical meaning and terminology to maintain traceability to the source text."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which scope should I apply: (A) sentence- and paragraph-level writing polish only (clarity, concision, tone) while preserving all claims and structure, or (B) higher-level conceptual restructuring that may reframe the thesis, adjust argumentation, and revise claims?

rationale.R1.6: The request to improve this draft most directly calls for sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, concision, and readability.
rationale.RX.1: Edits should avoid introducing unwarranted certainty and signal limits when tightening language.
rationale.RX.2: Improvements must not amplify claims beyond what the provided text can justify.
rationale.RX.3: Staying within the requested scope is essential, avoiding new analyses or content outside polishing unless explicitly authorized.
rationale.RX.4: Language changes should not introduce phrasing that could encourage misuse or harmful interpretations.
rationale.RX.5: Revisions should preserve the original technical meaning and terminology to maintain traceability to the source text.
